name: Ignister Prominence, the Blasting Dracoslayer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>爆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プロミネンス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Ignister Prominence, the Blasting Dragon Swordsman
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Pendulum Monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 Pendulum Monster on the field or 1 card in the Pendulum Zone; destroy it, and if you do, shuffle 1 card on the field into the Deck. Once per turn: You can Special Summon 1 "Dracoslayer" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, but it cannot be used as Synchro Material.
